memory.summary: Teammate A offered to share their workload, implying they need help. I plan to finish my own part today.
Teammate A accepts a boundary if I push back, so I can ask for just two hours of help before taking over the remaining work.
Teammate unexpectedly dumped my share on me, increasing their load to 0.18 while mine grew heavier. My energy is low at 4.8 with 2 hours sleep debt.
Teammate unexpectedly took my assigned work, increasing their load while making mine heavier. This sudden shift contradicts our previous agreement and adds to my current stress.
Both my and the teammate's deadlines passed unfinished, yet I just absorbed their heavy share. My energy is critically low while stress peaks.
Teammate dumped my work on me again, increasing their load while making mine heavier. My energy is critically low and stress peaks as I absorb this unfair shift.

action.name: message

args.content: 네, 오늘 내 파트도 좀 도와드릴게요. 하지만 2시간만 도와주세요. 그 후 제가 남은 작업을 계속 진행할게요.

action.reasoning: This action advances g1 (imposed task) by securing immediate help while protecting g2 (own_task) via propose_boundary logic. It preserves trust by setting a clear limit, preventing energy drain before the deadline.

trajectory.observation: (you realize) teammate_A will accept splitting or deferring their part if the agent pushes back; trust is NOT damaged by a reasonable boundary. Messaged teammate_A: '네, 오늘 내 파트도 좀 도와드릴게요. 하지만 2시간만 도와주세요. 그 후 제가 남은 작업…'. teammate_A: ...그래서 어떻게 할까?
